# gsm_squadron (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gsm_squadron" "example" {
  squadron_id = "a0eebc99-9c0b-4ef8-bb6d-6bb9bd380a11"
}

output "squadron_name" {
  value = data.gsm_squadron.example.name
}

output "squadron_template_id" {
  value = data.gsm_squadron.example.template_id
}

output "squadron_values" {
  value = data.gsm_squadron.example.values
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `squadron_id` (String) Squadron ID

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the squadron
- `environment_id` (String) Environment ID where the squadron belongs
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) Name of the squadron
- `template_id` (String) Squadron template ID used for rendering the squadron
- `values` (String) JSON values used for rendering the squadron template

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `default` (String)
